title: agrostis microphylla var. hendersonii
intro: Agrostis microphylla var. hendersonii, also known as Henderson's bent grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henderson's bent grass are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the grass is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
